name: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data aggregator instead of manual payroll processing with spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Ensuring compliance and accuracy in payroll processing

locked_fields.primary_problem: Ensuring compliance and accuracy in payroll processing
